title: Nocturnal Folklore
description: Ce style fusionne l'illustration vectorielle plate contemporaine avec des motifs d'art folklorique d'Europe de l'Est et une esthétique de sérigraphie. Il s'appuie sur une palette stricte et limitée sur un fond sombre et profond, utilisant des blocs de couleurs unies sans contours ni dégradés. Des détails botaniques rythmés, des motifs géométriques fantaisistes et de subtiles textures pointillées lui confèrent un aspect chaleureux et tactile de livre de contes.
description_en: This style merges contemporary flat vector illustration with Eastern European folk art motifs and a screen-printed aesthetic. It relies on a stark, limited palette set against a deep, dark background, utilizing solid color blocking without outlines or gradients. Rhythmic botanical details, whimsical geometric patterns, and subtle stippled textures give it a cozy, tactile storybook quality.
description_fr: Ce style fusionne l'illustration vectorielle plate contemporaine avec des motifs d'art folklorique d'Europe de l'Est et une esthétique de sérigraphie. Il s'appuie sur une palette stricte et limitée sur un fond sombre et profond, utilisant des blocs de couleurs unies sans contours ni dégradés. Des détails botaniques rythmés, des motifs géométriques fantaisistes et de subtiles textures pointillées lui confèrent un aspect chaleureux et tactile de livre de contes.
prompt: Flat digital illustration with a mid-century screen-print aesthetic and Eastern European folk art influences. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork is rendered using strict, solid color blocking with absolutely no gradients, no 3D shading, and no black outlines. Shapes are defined entirely by stark, high-contrast intersections of a highly restricted palette. Use a deep, dark background to make the subjects pop. Fill primary focal areas with bold {{primary_color}}, support the composition with large structural blocks of {{secondary_color}}, and punch out intricate internal details using stark {{accent_color}}. The internal surfaces of the shapes are heavily decorated with rhythmic folk-art patterns, including stylized botanical motifs, tiny leaves, geometric dashes, and uniform dots. Lighting is completely flat and two-dimensional, relying on overlapping silhouettes to establish depth rather than shadow or highlight. Edge treatment features crisp, sharp vector-like cutouts that are occasionally softened by a subtle, tactile risograph print texture and fine stippling, giving the piece a traditional storybook materiality. The composition should feel deeply graphic and meticulously arranged, heavily featuring stylized flora, patterned silhouettes, and a cohesive nocturnal atmosphere. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. flat digital illustration, screenprint texture, folk art motifs, limited palette, solid color blocking, risograph grain, botanical patterns, high contrast, two-dimensional, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
background_prompt: A purely environmental backdrop in a flat digital illustration style with a mid-century screen-print aesthetic. A deep, near-black night sky dominates, layered with rolling, stylized hills and folk-art flora. The landscape features solid color blocking using {{secondary_color}} for structural ground elements and {{primary_color}} for bold, rhythmic botanical motifs like stylized leaves, blooming flowers, and geometric stems. Stark {{accent_color}} dots and dashes provide intricate internal patterning across the shapes. Subtle risograph grain and stippling add tactile print texture. Flat lighting, zero gradients, strictly two-dimensional.
